Hi, Bridgette!: Don't you want to dance?
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你不想跳舞嗎？

Hi, Bridgette!: What for?  There's no one to dance with.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 為什麼？沒人跟我跳舞啊。

Hi, Bridgette!: What for?
嗨，布麗琪特！: 為什麼？

Hi, Bridgette!: You know all about it, now.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 現在你全知道了。

Hi, Bridgette!: Don't be greedy.  You already have some.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 別貪心。你已經有一些了。

Hi, Bridgette!: There is a ring of mushrooms on the northwest side of the clearing.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 空地的西北邊有個蘑菇圈。

Hi, Bridgette!: There aren't any of those around.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 這附近沒有那種東西。

Hi, Bridgette!: You see trees and brush.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你看到樹木和灌木。

Hi, Bridgette!: For such wimpy-looking creatures, those fairies sure can play rough!  You never danced so hard in your entire life, which is now over.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 這些看起來很弱不禁風的傢伙，妖精們竟然那麼兇悍！你一生從未跳過那麼猛烈的舞蹈，現在已經結束了。

Hi, Bridgette!: You eat a few of the lovely mushrooms.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你吃了幾個美妙的蘑菇。

Hi, Bridgette!: As the fairy dust sifts through your fingers, you realize that you needed something to put it into.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 仙粉穿過你的手指時，你意識到需要某個東西來裝它。

Hi, Bridgette!: The objects on the ground are a brigand's shield and spear.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 地上的物品是山賊的盾牌和長槍。

Hi, Bridgette!: The dead brigand's shield is not worth your while.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 死山賊的盾牌不值得你動手。

Hi, Bridgette!: You are using the old archery target for dagger practice.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你用舊弓箭靶來練習匕首。

Hi, Bridgette!: The only daggers around here are the ones you've thrown at the target.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 這裡唯一的匕首就是你扔在靶上的那些。

Hi, Bridgette!: There are no useable spears near you.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你附近沒有可用的長槍。

Hi, Bridgette!: These bushes are full of thorns. You decide not to risk it.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 這些灌木全是荊棘。你決定不冒這個險。

Hi, Bridgette!: Some marauding beast must have taken the brigand's body away.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 某隻掠食野獸一定是把山賊的屍體帶走了。

Hi, Bridgette!: You see nothing like that here.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你這裡沒看到這樣的東西。

Hi, Bridgette!: The wall and buildings of Spielburg can be seen over the heavy brush.  An old target leans against the town wall.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 隔著濃密的灌木可以看到史畢柏格的城牆和建築。一個舊靶子靠在城牆上。

Hi, Bridgette!: You see a couple of hard-looking characters talking.  One looks like a thief; the other appears to be a fighter of some sort.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你看到幾個看起來兇悍的傢伙在談話。其中一個看起來像盜賊，另一個似乎是某種格鬥者。

Hi, Bridgette!: Seems the hero" wandering around here has her leery.  She thinks he's going to go for the gold on her head."
嗨，布麗琪特！: 「那個『英雄』在這裡到處遊蕩，讓她很警惕。她以為他會去奪她頭上的懸賞。」

Hi, Bridgette!: And the laughing jackass' eyeing me.  I had to sneak out.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 「那個愛笑的傢伙還盯著我。我只好偷偷溜了出來。」

Hi, Bridgette!: Don't lose it.  I got the only other one.  Yull haveta search the rock for the keyhole.  It's hidden good.  And remember the 'word'.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 「別丟了。我有唯一的另一把。你得在石頭裡搜尋鑰匙孔。它藏得很好。還要記住那個『暗語』。」

Hi, Bridgette!: What Word?
嗨，布麗琪特！: 「什麼暗語？」

Hi, Bridgette!: Oh yeah, sure.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 「噢，是的，當然。」

Hi, Bridgette!: What is it?
嗨，布麗琪特！: 「是什麼？」

Hi, Bridgette!: Say the 'word' before ya open the door or ya might make Fred mad.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 「在你打開門之前要說那個『暗語』，不然可能會惹 Fred 生氣。」

Hi, Bridgette!: You're too close to the target for it to be a challange.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你離靶子太近，它成不了挑戰。

Hi, Bridgette!: You have no daggers to throw.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你沒有匕首可以扔。

Hi, Bridgette!: You can't get any daggers.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你拿不到任何匕首。

Hi, Bridgette!: For a moment there, you thought you saw something.  But nothing is there now.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 有那麼一刻，你以為看到什麼。但現在什麼都沒有。

Hi, Bridgette!: The stag looks more surprised than hurt.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 那隻雄鹿看起來驚訝多於受傷。

Hi, Bridgette!: She tells you:  "It's not nice to fool Mother Nature."
嗨，布麗琪特！: 她告訴你：「戲弄大自然母親是不禮貌的。」

Hi, Bridgette!: Please.  Just answer my question.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 「拜託。只要回答我的問題。」

Hi, Bridgette!: The rocks to the north look too steep.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 北邊的岩石看起來太陡峭。

Hi, Bridgette!: Perhaps the farmer has dates in his field.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 「也許農夫在他的田裡有棗子。」

Hi, Bridgette!: I beg your pardon?
嗨，布麗琪特！: 「你說什麼？」

Hi, Bridgette!: You think better of burning up the woods.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你改變主意，決定不放火燒毀森林。

Hi, Bridgette!: You cannot look at what you cannot see.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你無法看到看不見的東西。

Hi, Bridgette!: There is a rock wall northwest of the large oak tree.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 大橡樹的西北邊有一面石牆。

Hi, Bridgette!: You see no such animal.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你沒看到這樣的動物。

Hi, Bridgette!: The forest becomes so lush and thick that it is difficult to see far.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 森林變得如此茂密，很難看得遠。

Hi, Bridgette!: The brush and undergrowth has formed an impassable thicket.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 灌木和地被植物形成了不可通過的灌木叢。

Hi, Bridgette!: You see thick brush, rocks, and heavy woods to the north.  A large oak tree dominates the view.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你看到北邊有濃密的灌木、岩石和茂密的森林。一棵大橡樹佔據了視野。

Hi, Bridgette!: You see a clearing back the way you came.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你看到來時路的方向有個空地。

Hi, Bridgette!: I am the Dryad, keeper of the woods.  Are you one with the woods?
嗨，布麗琪特！: 「我是樹精，森林的守護者。你與森林融為一體嗎？」

Hi, Bridgette!: Friend, you must know that there is an evil in this valley which perverts the ways of nature.  The prophecy says that a hero will bring a young human from out this darkness.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 「朋友，你必須知道這個山谷裡有股邪惡勢力扭曲了大自然的方式。預言說一個英雄會把一個年輕的人類從這黑暗中帶出來。」

Hi, Bridgette!: If you are the one to accomplish this task, there is a potion to break enchantments which you must have the Healer make.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 「如果你是完成這項任務的人，你需要讓治療師製作一瓶解除詛咒的魔藥。」

Hi, Bridgette!: You dare to harm the Dryad of this forest!  You must be made less dangerous.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 「你竟敢傷害這片森林的樹精！你必須被制服。」

Hi, Bridgette!: You sleep comfortably and well in this quiet and protected corner of the woods.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你在這片寧靜安全的森林角落舒服地睡得很好。

Hi, Bridgette!: The stag seems to be magically protected.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 那隻雄鹿似乎受到魔法保護。

Hi, Bridgette!: You don't see a stag here.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你這裡沒看到雄鹿。

Hi, Bridgette!: You see no Antwerps here.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你這裡沒看到安特衛普。

Hi, Bridgette!: Where to? There is no escaping the hurtling blue blob.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 往哪裡？你無法逃脫飛來的藍色物體。

Hi, Bridgette!: There is a roaring sound off to the east.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 東邊傳來一陣咆哮聲。

Hi, Bridgette!: The hollow log looks somberly back with it's single giant eye and you know at once that nothing is to be gained by investigating this gaunt relic of a more vertical past.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 那根空心的木頭用它唯一的巨大眼睛沮喪地看著你，你立刻明白調查這個龐大的垂直過去的遺跡沒有任何好處。

Hi, Bridgette!: You'll have to climb down to do that.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你得爬下來才能做到。

Hi, Bridgette!: A river plunges for more than a hundred feet down the face of a cliff.  A doorway has been built into the side of the cliff.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 一條河流從懸崖面上直瀉下超過百英尺。崖邊建了一道門。

Hi, Bridgette!: You see slick, vertical cliff walls.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你看到光滑的垂直崖壁。

Hi, Bridgette!: The water is white as it splashes against the rocks with great force and purpose and disappears into a narrow canyon to the south.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 水流撞擊岩石時衝出白色泡沫，然後消失在南邊的狹窄峽谷中。

Hi, Bridgette!: The grass is green with the freshness of new spring.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 草地呈現新春的嫩綠。

Hi, Bridgette!: you don't have a flask
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你沒有水瓶

Hi, Bridgette!: The water comes from melting snow.  This early in the season, it's much too cold to swim.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 水來自融雪。這個季節這麼早，水冷得不能游泳。

Hi, Bridgette!: The door is securely locked.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 門被牢牢鎖住了。

Hi, Bridgette!: The door is so securely locked that it defies your abilities to unlock it.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 門被鎖得太牢固，超出了你的開鎖能力。

Hi, Bridgette!: You're in front of the door already.  You don't need to climb any farther.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你已經在門前了。不需要再往上爬。

Hi, Bridgette!: Missed
嗨，布麗琪特！: 偏了

Hi, Bridgette!: Flat...you feel very, very flat.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 扁了……你感到非常非常扁。

Hi, Bridgette!: And dead...you feel dead, too.  In your weakened condition, you succumbed to a mild-mannered hermit's propensity for Tarzan imitations.  Back up and play it again, Sam.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 死了……你也感到死了。在你虛弱的狀態下，你屈服於一個溫和隱士的泰山模仿傾向。倒帶重玩，Sam。

Hi, Bridgette!: Just a minute!  Just a minute!
嗨，布麗琪特！: 「等一下！等一下！」

Hi, Bridgette!: You see a chair.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你看到一把椅子。

Hi, Bridgette!: The cave is cold and clammy and it smells like mildew and wet dog hair in here!
嗨，布麗琪特！: 這個洞穴又冷又濕，聞起來像黴味和濕狗毛！

Hi, Bridgette!: The walls are covered with phosphorescent fungus.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 牆壁上佈滿磷光菌。

Hi, Bridgette!: The phosphorescent fungus glows eerily in the cave's dim light.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 磷光菌在洞穴昏暗的光線中詭異地發光。

Hi, Bridgette!: Me guest bed is the straw in the corner over there. You're welcome to come back and sleep tonight since you've shared your rations.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 「我的客人床就是角落那邊的稻草。既然你分享了你的給養，歡迎你今晚回來睡覺。」

Hi, Bridgette!: Get closer to the bed of straw.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 靠近稻草床。

Hi, Bridgette!: You need to get closer to the chair.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你需要靠近椅子。

Hi, Bridgette!: You are already sitting... on your brain, perhaps?
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你已經坐下了……也許坐在你的腦子上？

Hi, Bridgette!: You're not sitting.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你沒有坐著。

Hi, Bridgette!: The 'ermit wouldn't like that.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 那個『隱士』不會喜歡那樣。

Hi, Bridgette!: Despite your intentions, you can't bring yourself to spend any more time playing with the talkative 'Enry.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 儘管你有意願，你無法讓自己再花時間和那個話多的『亨利』玩。

Hi, Bridgette!: You spend an hour at the game while 'Enry talks.  You've obviously made his day.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你花了一小時玩遊戲，同時『亨利』說著話。你顯然讓他開心了一整天。

Hi, Bridgette!: You should sit down first.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你應該先坐下。

Hi, Bridgette!: You see no scroll.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你沒看到捲軸。

Hi, Bridgette!: It's not polite to steal from your 'airy little 'ost.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 從你『氣派的小』『主人』那裡偷東西不禮貌。

Hi, Bridgette!: If you be wanting to learn the spell, I'll be pleased to share it to you.  It's just getting molding in me 'iding place.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 「如果你想學習法術，我很樂意分享給你。它只是在我『藏』的地方發黴。」

Hi, Bridgette!: I don't 'ave much, but wot I 'ave, I 'ave, an' t'isn't for sale.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 「我沒『有』多少，但我『有』的就是『有』，不是為了出售。」

Hi, Bridgette!: Well, see'en as I don't get out much, I don't know much.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 「嗯，既然我不常出門，我也不知道多少。」

Hi, Bridgette!: After having traded a ration, which the 'ermit promptly swallowed, and spending a rather boring hour of cribbage and listening to 'Enry chatter, you hit the hay.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 在交換了給養（『隱士』迅速吞下），並花了相當無聊的一小時玩牌戲和聽『亨利』閒聊後，你倒頭就睡。

Hi, Bridgette!: By golly, It's %s!
嗨，布麗琪特！: 天哪，是 %s！

Hi, Bridgette!: Antwerps are on the endangered species list.  They are rarely seen.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 安特衛普在瀕危物種名單上。它們很少被看到。

Hi, Bridgette!: You do not find anything nearby.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你附近找不到任何東西。

Hi, Bridgette!: You aren't close enough to a lock.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你離鎖太遠。

Hi, Bridgette!: You have no weapon with which to fight the Antwerp.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你沒有武器與安特衛普戰鬥。

Hi, Bridgette!: However, you bravely attack the bouncing beast with your bare hands.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 然而，你勇敢地用赤手空拳攻擊這個彈跳的野獸。

Hi, Bridgette!: The only Antwerp known to these parts, split ...into parts.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 這個地方唯一已知的安特衛普，分解成……碎片。

Hi, Bridgette!: He's on a diet.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 他在節食。

Hi, Bridgette!: You hear the sound of someone...or something...moving deeper into the cave to let you pass.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你聽到某個……或某種東西……在洞穴深處移動以讓路的聲音。

Hi, Bridgette!: Ok, you say Hiden Goseke.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 好的，你說出「海登·格塞克」。

Hi, Bridgette!: Go ahead. If you dare.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 向前走。如果你敢的話。

Hi, Bridgette!: By golly, it's an Antwerp!
嗨，布麗琪特！: 天哪，是安特衛普！

Hi, Bridgette!: The Antwerp plays rough.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 安特衛普玩得很兇。

Hi, Bridgette!: The old ticker just couldn't keep going.  Maybe you shouldn't have missed the annual visit with your local Healer.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 老心臟停了。也許你不應該錯過與本地治療師的年度檢查。

Hi, Bridgette!: You see a flock of geese as it passes overhead.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你看到一群鵝飛過頭頂。

Hi, Bridgette!: You see the reflection of a flock of geese as it passes overhead.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你看到一群鵝飛過頭頂的倒影。

Hi, Bridgette!: It must be your imagination.  What would a submarine be doing in a fantasy adventure?  Perhaps you'd rather be playing `Code Name: Iceman' -- it has a submarine.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 那一定是你的想像。潛水艇在奇幻冒險中做什麼？也許你寧願玩『絕密代號：冰人』—— 它有潛水艇。

Hi, Bridgette!: You don't have anything in which to carry the water.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你沒有東西來裝水。

Hi, Bridgette!: It's the beautiful Spiegelsee (Mirror Lake).  You pause for some peaceful reflection.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 這是美麗的施皮格爾湖（鏡湖）。你停下來進行一些寧靜的冥想。

Hi, Bridgette!: There is a strong odor of decay and other more unpleasant smells filling the air.  A pile of something unpleasant lies near the center of this cave.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 空氣中充滿了強烈的腐爛味和其他令人不適的氣味。一堆令人不適的東西堆在這個洞穴的中心附近。

Hi, Bridgette!: The water has been polluted by various other disgusting liquids.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 水被各種令人厭惡的液體污染了。

Hi, Bridgette!: It looks as if someone has piled up bones, bits of armor, and things you can't quite make out and probably don't want to know about. It smells disgusting.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 看起來有人堆積了骨頭、盔甲碎片，以及你無法看清楚且可能不想知道的東西。聞起來很噁心。

Hi, Bridgette!: You can't do that.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你做不了。

Hi, Bridgette!: You need to get closer to the dead Troll.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你需要靠近死巨魔。

Hi, Bridgette!: The password is for the hidden passage, not the troll's home.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 密碼是用於隱藏通道的，不是巨魔的家。

Hi, Bridgette!: Get closer to the pile.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 靠近那堆東西。

Hi, Bridgette!: You don't need it.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你不需要它。

Hi, Bridgette!: This Troll looks as though he'd rather eat YOU!
嗨，布麗琪特！: 這隻巨魔看起來寧願吃掉你！

Hi, Bridgette!: You hear the constant "drip... drip..." of water, and the unmistakeable sound of something breathing nearby.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你聽到持續的「滴……滴……」水聲，以及附近某物呼吸的清晰聲音。

Hi, Bridgette!: There is nothing here to use that spell on.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 這裡沒有東西可以用法術施展。

Hi, Bridgette!: The cave troll is dead.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 洞穴巨魔死了。

Hi, Bridgette!: Before you can notice him, a Troll sneaks up behind you, and the encounter begins.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你還沒注意到他，一隻巨魔從你身後溜上來，戰鬥開始了。

Hi, Bridgette!: The Troll's brute force was too much for your skull.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 巨魔的蠻力對你的頭骨來說太強了。

Hi, Bridgette!: There is nothing of value on the Troll.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 巨魔身上沒有值錢的東西。

Hi, Bridgette!: You dig around in the pile until the odor almost makes you sick.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你在堆裡翻找，直到臭味幾乎讓你生病。

Hi, Bridgette!: You find nothing more of value.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你找不到更多值錢的東西。

Hi, Bridgette!: You find 30 silvers and 5 gold.
嗨，布麗琪特！: 你找到 30 銀幣和 5 金幣。

Hi, Bridgette!: There is no beard hair left on the Troll.
